Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates Louisiana blue crabs. (Did you know Louisiana is the country's biggest producer?)
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: Emeril shares the accessible and sustainable virtues of southern caviar.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril turns up the heat and turns the spotlight on Louisiana hot sauce!
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril shows you how to make the most of figs.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril prepares a Tex-Mex menu to dazzle Houston Texan superfans.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: Emeril and Guests Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Emeril and Guests Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis
Emeril and Guests Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Janie Glade

Video.summary: Denver superfan Catherine Highland, aka The Bronco Babe, grills up dishes to honor the state of Colorado.
Video.title: Denver

Video.summary: Emeril helps you wake up guests with coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Big Freedia

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp?
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay-style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Morning Glory, an invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates the flavorful Creole tomato, grown from rich soil of the Mississippi Delta.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.summary: For a New York-style tailgate, indulge in some of New York City's Italian favorites.
Video.title: New York Jets

Video.summary: For a Cincinnati-style tailgate, Emeril's Ohio favorites will make you the MVP of any party.
Video.title: Cincinnati Bengals

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates strawberry season with three picnic-ready recipes.
Video.title: Strawberry Festival

Video.summary: Triumph at your next tailgate with Emeril's easy (and crowd-pleasing) crab dishes.
Video.title: Baltimore Ravens

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare dishes inspired by Shermond's brunch menu.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril and Kimberly Patton-Bragg create a holiday menu around New Orleans' official cocktail, the Sazerac.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Kim Patton-Bragg

Video.summary: Nothing says Washington, D.C. like Emeril's crispy chicken wings with mumbo sauce.
Video.title: Washington Commanders

Video.summary: Atlanta Falcons superfan Thomas Dunn draws from his city's Southern delicacies.
Video.title: Atlanta

Video.summary: Emeril meets Vikings fans Jim Dazzle and Brandie Pac from Minneapolis.
Video.title: Minneapolis

Video.summary: Emeril makes ribeye's on the grill, spinach, baked potatoes, and four cheese mac in honor of Sin City.
Video.title: Las Vegas

Video.summary: Emeril prepares his favorite football menu. These are the dishes that Emeril serves to his family and friends!
Video.title: How Emeril Tailgates

Video.summary: Emeril and Justin Kennedy of Parkway Bakery and Tavern prepare a menu with classic New Orleans sandwiches.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Justin Kennedy

Video.title: Emeril's Tropical Fruit Stand

Video.summary: Emeril makes over-the-top fried snacks.
Video.title: Fun Fried Foods

Video.summary: Nobody knows how to throw a barbecue like Emeril. This episode he's making old favorites with some new twists.
Video.title: BBQ
